title: He Toki Huna: New Zealand in Afghanistan
original_title: He Toki Huna: New Zealand in Afghanistan
overview: Annie Goldson and Kay Ellmers’ doco, expanded from the film they made for Maori Television, takes a timely look at New Zealand’s military and media, notably journalist Jon Stephenson, in Afghanistan.
